intended_use: Volpara is a software application intended for use with the raw data from digital breast x-ray systems, including tomosynthesis. Volpara calculates and quantifies a density map and from that determine
intended_use_full: Volpara is a software application intended for use with the raw data from digital breast x-ray systems, including tomosynthesis. Volpara calculates and quantifies a density map and from that determines volumetric breast density as a ratio of fibroglandular tissue and total breast volume estimates. Volpara provides these numerical values along with a BI-RADS breast density 4th or 5th Edition category to aid health care professionals in the assessment of breast tissue composition. Volpara is not an interpretive or diagnostic aid and should be used only as adjunctive information when the final assessment of breast density category is made by an MQSA-qualified interpreting physician.
target_condition: Breast tissue composition assessment; breast density evaluation
ground_truth: Breast phantoms with known values; 3D breast MRI data; MQSA-qualified radiologist BI-RADS 4th and 5th Edition assessments; age-related breast density population data; cross-system comparisons (GE, Hologic, Siemens)
other_metrics: Measurement accuracy assessed via breast phantoms with known values; relationship to ground truth assessed via comparison of fibroglandular tissue estimates with 3D breast MRI data; reproducibility assessed across age-related density changes, bilateral breast symmetry, cross-system consistency (GE vs Hologic), and tomosynthesis vs mammography modes; relationship to visual assessment assessed via comparison with MQSA radiologist BI-RADS categorizations
